It may not be out of place to mention here that the Rent Act ceased to have any force after the 31st of March, 1976, but Bihar Act 16 of 1977 has been given retrospective effect from the 1st of April, 1976. The provisions of the Rent Act have been, for all material purposes, perpetuated up to the 31st March, 1981. 2. The appellant had got a decree for eviction in his favour in the trial court.
